What entities are present on the wooden surface and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A cream note card titled Creator's Note sits left on a wooden surface. A purple book cover displaying a hand stands right. Below, a pink banner contains white text and a downward arrow. The static arrangement rests on a light brown grain background.

Describe the sequence of visual elements and text overlays that appear from the beginning of the video until the creator's note is shown.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the bunny show logo appears with a pencil and paintbrush; at 4s, multiple hand gesture illustrations appear over a wooden surface; at 8s, a male character in pink stands next to a female character while text asks about his outfit; at 14s, the title Basic Tutorial How to Draw Hands appears with red circles highlighting hands; at 18s, a creator note card appears with explanatory text.
